title: FEDERAL GRANT REVIEW ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 9A.  FEDERAL GRANT REVIEW ACT

§661.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the Federal Grant Review Act.

Acts 1978, No. 724, §1, eff. Oct.  1, 1978.
